title: Level Z - Death Knights
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Death Knights mod from the RPG series.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Death Knights mod in the RPG series.

This addon adds level requirements for most death knight weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add this mod to your Level Z modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
